name: conflux
description: Conflux integration — read and write thoughts, session context, and agent handoff notes in Claude Code

hooks.prompt: Conflux thoughts are available. When the user's first message implies project work (debugging, implementing, designing, or continuing prior work), SILENTLY search for relevant prior context using `conflux thoughts --search "relevant keyword" --source agent` to find agent handoff notes from previous sessions. Do NOT search for casual messages like greetings or simple questions. Do NOT mention this search to the user unless you find something relevant.
